Meta Go
FeaturesPricingDemoDocs
Meta GoSubscription

Identity as a Service

Embed sovereign, deepfake-resistant identity into your product. Pay only for what you verify.

Personal

Free

  • 1 sovereign identity
  • Up to 10 credentials
  • Basic ZK proof
  • Email support

Starter

$29/mo

  • 5 identities
  • 100 credentials
  • 5K verifications/mo
  • Cross-chain DIDs
  • API access
  • Priority email
Most popular

Pro

$149/mo

  • 50 identities
  • 1,000 credentials
  • 100K verifications/mo
  • Webhook events
  • Dedicated relay
  • Phone support

Enterprise

Custom

  • Unlimited everything
  • On-prem deploy
  • Custom SLAs
  • GDPR/SOC2 audit pack
  • Dedicated CSM
  • 24/7 support

Payment Methods

Stripe · Razorpay · Crypto (USDC on Polygon) — all gated by your sovereign identity, not a credit card alone.
